name: Tripp Lite UPS
config_flow_discovery_remarks: Before setting up, enable the **Nominal Power** entity on your NUT device (Settings → Devices → your UPS → disabled entities). This profile needs it to calculate power output.

power_factor.label: Power Factor
power_factor.description: Ratio of real power to apparent power. Use 0.6 for computers/electronics, 0.7 for mixed loads, 1.0 for resistive loads like heaters. [See docs](https://docs.powercalc.nl/cookbook/ups/)
